'''''Saki''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]. ''Saki'' was part of the the [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] task force at [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], it was also present during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

{{Ship-stub}}
